calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Request For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BANK OF THE WEST.
Court on the record granted Plaintiff's Ex-parte application for Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARK C. LAMBRICK.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $32,329.58
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,150.00
Costs: $812.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $35,292.08
7. Other: Judgment of possession of the equipment identified in Exhibit A attached hereto which is incorporated by this reference. Plailntiff to provide defendant with credit for any recovery made on equipment.
Judgment signed in open court.
